heading: Syntax
body:
The following syntax creates a collection for an HTTP (HyperText Transport Protocol) federated database instance store.

```sh
db.runCommand({ "create" : "<collection-name>", "dataSources" : [{ "storeName" : "<store-name>", "allowInsecure" : true|false, "urls" : [ "<url>" ], "defaultFormat" :  "<file-extension>" }]})
```
